label: Research & Analysis
description: Deep research on any topic. Claude gathers and synthesizes sources, maintains structured notes, and produces clear reports. Good for market research, technical due diligence, policy analysis, or competitive intel.
initial_prompt: Read CLAUDE.md. Restate the research question in your own words, identify the 3 most important things we need to find out, and propose a research approach. Then ask if I want to adjust the scope before we start.
